query: Wang Yi China Foreign Minister visit South Korea 2026 postponed Taiwan dispute rescheduled July August 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the key finding for the forecasting system:

**Bottom line:** There is **no confirmed record** of a formally scheduled Wang Yi visit to South Korea in 2026 that was officially "postponed" and then publicly "rescheduled" to July or August 2026. The trajectory instead shows:

1. **Seoul sought the visit** but it never reached the stage of confirmed dates (as of April 20, 2026, MOFA said "no specific arrangements have been finalized").

2. **The Taiwan labeling dispute** was the backdrop: South Korea removed the "China (Taiwan)" label from its e-arrival card on March 31, 2026 (after Taiwan's Dec 2025 protest), and China objected strongly on April 14, 2026.

3. **Conflicting framing:** Some Korea Times reporting said China put the visit "on hold" over the labeling dispute, but Seoul's Foreign Ministry **explicitly denied** the delay was Taiwan-related, calling the card change a "simple administrative and technical adjustment."

4. **Broader strain:** China also denied entry to South Korea's intelligence chief (~April 21, 2026) over Taiwan remarks, casting further doubt on a 2026 Wang Yi visit.

5. **Wang Yi's actual July 2026 travel** was confirmed to the **four Nordic countries (July 2–8)** — not South Korea.

**No source mentions specific July or August 2026 rescheduled dates** for a Korea visit. Data vintage runs through July 9–10, 2026.

sources.title: China puts Wang Yi's Seoul visit on hold over Taiwan labeling dispute (Foreign ministry says no details finalized)
sources.snippet: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs said Monday that no specific arrangements have been finalized for Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi's potential visit to Seoul; delay linked to Taiwan labeling dispute after Seoul removed 'China (Taiwan)' from e-arrival card on March 31.

sources.title: Foreign ministry denies Wang Yi visit delay due to Taiwan labeling issue
sources.snippet: Ministry rejected reports the visit was delayed due to e-arrival card changes, calling the revision 'a simple administrative and technical adjustment'; two sides still communicating over the matter.

sources.title: China blocks South Korean spy chief visit amid Taiwan tensions
sources.snippet: China denied entry to NIS Director Lee Jong-seok over Taiwan remarks; strained atmosphere cast doubt on a 2026 Wang Yi visit to South Korea that Seoul has sought.

sources.title: Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Guo Jiakun's Regular Press Conference on June 30, 2026
sources.snippet: Wang Yi will visit Denmark, Sweden, Finland and Norway from July 2 to 8, 2026.

sources.title: Top Leader of the DPRK Kim Jong Un Meets with Wang Yi
sources.snippet: On April 10, 2026, Kim Jong Un met with Wang Yi in Pyongyang during Wang's April 9-10 DPRK visit.

sources.title: 2026 state visit by Xi Jinping to North Korea
sources.snippet: Xi Jinping made a state visit to North Korea June 8-9, 2026, meeting Kim Jong Un.

sources.title: Taiwan Protests South Korea's China (Taiwan) Label on Arrival Forms
